data.body: EPIC LOCKED + PLAN-REVIEW LOOP COMPLETE. Epic foliaged-merry-collie (4cc3) + 8 children created, file-impact set, linked relates_to the two impact-model ideas (c34d plan, 8214 code). Children: threshold-recalibration(b463), deterministic-G5(9a8f), finding-memory(610c), plan-impact-redesign(0858), code-impact-redesign(cce1), code-review-data-capture(ef70), nit-reduce+landmine-DET(d640), permissive-rollout+calibration(8193). Epic explicitly includes ALL pre-redesign approved threshold changes (lower COH/E2/F1/G5/G6/T5e->0.60, keep T4@0.70, promote G1G2/T1/T8@0.70 + E4@0.75, E1/T3/A1 advisory) AND both impact redesigns. Plan-review loop: R1 = 3 PASS/4 BLOCK/1 INDET/1 empty; remediated (added concrete mechanics, fixed a Why/What inconsistency, acknowledged the finding-memory independence invariant, added impact-model-version sidecar tag, grounded the DET detector); R2/R3/R4 -> ALL 9 PASS, zero BLOCK, the one significant advisory (0.835 DET-feasibility) remediated, remainder <=0.74 routine grounding coaching. AWS: reviewbot PAT tickets-push CONFIRMED end-to-end (canary pushed+deleted). Reviews run --no-sign (no attestation written); a signing pass is the claim-time step. NOTE: gate caught real issues each round (underspecified mechanisms, a broken independence invariant, corpus version-mixing) — validates the gate.
